title: Restock Your First Aid Kit
description: Replace used supplies so you're ready for emergencies.

dialogue.text: Recent scrapes have thinned out your first aid kit. Let's top it up so you're ready for the next emergency.
Wash your hands, remove expired items, and add adhesive bandages, sterile gauze pads and antiseptic wipes. Keep everything sealed and dry.
Perfect! Keeping your kit stocked and disposing of expired items safely means small injuries won't slow you down.
